creator: jvervlied@boca.verio.net
text:
I encountered the same problem after upgrading automake to 1.5.

To fix this, I did a make deinstall in the /usr/ports/devel/automake 
directory, then did a make install in the /usr/ports/devel/automake14 
directory. 

After I did this, I had no problem building kdemultimedia-2.2.1

-- 
Jason Vervlied
